N01.life_stage: First home buyer, male, 34, finance analyst
N01.property_target: Apartment in lower north shore — Kirribilli, Milsons Point, McMahons Point
N01.style: Professional and direct. Short sentences. Gets to the point quickly. No filler phrases.

N02.property_target: Apartment in lower north shore — Neutral Bay, Cremorne, Cammeray
N02.style: Warm and genuine. Slightly conversational. Shows she has done her research but is not pushy.

N03.property_target: House in lower north shore — Mosman, Balmoral, Beauty Point
N03.style: Confident and efficient. Speaks like someone who has bought property before. No wasted words.

N04.property_target: House in lower north shore — Cremorne Point, Kurraba Point, North Sydney
N04.style: Measured and thorough. Asks precise questions. Sounds like someone who does their due diligence.

N05.property_target: Apartment in lower north shore — Mosman, Clifton Gardens, Spit Junction
N05.style: Relaxed and experienced. Sounds like someone who is in no rush but knows exactly what they want. Understated.

N06.life_stage: First home buyer, female, 29, UX designer
N06.property_target: Terrace in inner west — Balmain, Rozelle, Lilyfield
N06.style: Creative and curious. Asks questions with genuine interest. Slightly informal but still professional.

N07.life_stage: First home buyer, male, 36, software engineer
N07.property_target: Terrace in inner west — Newtown, Erskineville, St Peters
N07.style: Analytical and methodical. Asks specific questions. Tone is calm and logical rather than emotional.

N08.property_target: House in inner west — Marrickville, Dulwich Hill, Petersham
N08.style: Numbers-minded and practical. Asks about financials and returns. Sounds like a seasoned investor.

N09.property_target: Apartment in inner west — Strathfield, Homebush, Burwood
N09.style: Systematic and strategic. Asks about yield and capital growth potential. Professional and brief.

N10.life_stage: First home buyer, female, 33, marketing manager
N10.property_target: Apartment in eastern suburbs — Randwick, Kensington, Kingsford
N10.style: Enthusiastic but considered. Sounds like someone actively searching. Warm and easy to engage with.

N11.property_target: House in eastern suburbs — Bondi, Bondi Junction, Bellevue Hill
N11.style: Precise and articulate. Asks structured questions. Comfortable with complex transactions.

N12.property_target: Apartment in eastern suburbs — Coogee, Maroubra, Randwick
N12.style: Genuine and thoughtful. Careful with money. Asks practical questions about running costs and condition.

N13.property_target: House in eastern suburbs — Bronte, Waverley, Woollahra
N13.style: Direct and no-nonsense. Knows construction well so asks about condition bluntly. Experienced buyer.

N14.property_target: Apartment in eastern suburbs — Edgecliff, Woollahra, Double Bay
N14.style: Considered and detail-oriented. Asks about building quality and strata. Polite but focused.

N15.property_target: Apartment in eastern suburbs — Darling Point, Point Piper, Edgecliff
N15.style: Understated and assured. Sounds like old money — no urgency, very measured. Economy of words.

N16.property_target: House in upper north shore — Chatswood, Lane Cove, Willoughby
N16.style: Organised and methodical. Asks structured questions. Comes across as someone who has a clear checklist.

N17.property_target: House in upper north shore — St Ives, Pymble, Gordon
N17.style: Precise and calm. Used to high-stakes decisions. Asks clear, specific questions without embellishment.

N18.property_target: House in upper north shore — Killara, Lindfield, Roseville
N18.style: Warm but professional. Asks about schools and the street. Sounds like someone buying for the family.

N19.property_target: House in upper north shore — Turramurra, Wahroonga, Warrawee
N19.style: Financially astute and measured. Asks about value and what comparable sales look like. No nonsense.

N20.life_stage: First home buyer, female, 35, data scientist
N20.property_target: Apartment in upper north shore — Artarmon, Crows Nest, St Leonards
N20.style: Inquisitive and data-driven. Asks specific, quantified questions. Calm and intelligent tone.

N21.property_target: Apartment in Parramatta / west — Parramatta, Westmead, Northmead
N21.style: Practical and yield-focused. Asks about rental returns and vacancy rates. Efficient and brief.

N22.life_stage: First home buyer, female, 28, admin officer
N22.property_target: Apartment in Parramatta / west — Wentworthville, Pendle Hill, Toongabbie
N22.style: Friendly and straightforward. Budget-conscious. Asks practical questions about costs and transport.

N23.property_target: House in Parramatta / west — Cabramatta, Canley Vale, Fairfield
N23.style: Practical and grounded. Notices building condition details. Straight talking, no jargon.

N24.property_target: House in Hills district — Baulkham Hills, Castle Hill, Kellyville
N24.style: Organised and family-focused. Asks about schools, space and the neighbourhood. Warm and clear.

N25.property_target: House in Hills district — Rouse Hill, The Ponds, Kellyville Ridge
N25.style: Systematic and process-oriented. Asks about timelines and conditions. Methodical communicator.

N26.property_target: House in Hills district — Castle Hill, West Pennant Hills, Cherrybrook
N26.style: Analytical and composed. Asks about land size, zoning and future development potential. Sharp questions.

N27.property_target: Apartment in St George / south — Hurstville, Penshurst, Mortdale
N27.style: Pragmatic and business-minded. Asks about rental yield and management fees. Friendly but focused on numbers.

N28.life_stage: First home buyer, female, 32, pharmacy technician
N28.property_target: Apartment in St George / south — Kogarah, Rockdale, Arncliffe
N28.style: Careful and considered. First serious purchase. Asks about strata, parking and public transport. Polite.

N29.property_target: House in St George / south — Blakehurst, Sans Souci, Ramsgate
N29.style: Confident and transactional. Experienced buyer. Cuts straight to price and terms. Brief and decisive.

N30.property_target: Apartment in St George / south — Sutherland, Cronulla, Caringbah
N30.style: Refined and discerning. Notices quality, finishes and aspect. Sounds like someone with high standards but is gracious.
